findings.message: deno.json `license` field missing (must be `MIT` for alpha)
deno.json `publish.include` missing — `deno publish` ships everything by default and that leaks tests/scratch
mod.ts is 416 lines; convention cap is 200 — split into sub-entrypoints
mod.ts has 216 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
exported function 'watchRuntimeConfig' uses non-standard prefix 'watch' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
type 'RuntimeConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
no tests/ directory and no inline *_test.ts files — every package needs meaningful tests
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
